name: Philadelphia Sticky Buns
recipeInstructions:
1. Make the dough cycle or on MANUAL mode.
2. Roll out the dough into a rectangle about 1/4 to 1/8 inch thick, depending on how many and how large you want to make them.
3. Spread 1 TBL of soft butter around the edges, leaving a 1/4 inch edge.
4. Sprinkle cinnamon all around as desired.
5. Add 1/2 cup brown sugar and sprinkle evenly.
6. You can also add an equal amount of chopped nuts and raisins.
7. Roll up the dough into individual buns.
